_comment: PRESET: Microsoft + Google. Supply both credential sets -> SupportedIdentityProviders = [Microsoft, Google] (COGNITO intentionally omitted, federated-only: C8.3). Secrets shown empty; source from SSM/Secrets Manager at deploy time, never commit literals. managed_login_version: 1 = hosted UI classic, 2 = Managed Login branding (requires a per-client branding style).
